tasks.subject: F6.1: Add type/constructor reference queries to callee_query_str
tasks.description: Add tree-sitter queries for constructor calls, extends/implements, type annotations, struct literals to callee_query_str for all supported languages. Keep existing @callee capture name.

tasks.subject: F6.2: Raise caller caps + add --limit flag
tasks.description: Raise MAX_MATCHES and EARLY_QUIT_THRESHOLD. Add --limit N flag to CLI.

tasks.subject: F6.3: Build, test, assess noise
tasks.description: Build release, test on ghidra (ProgramDB callers) and CLIProxyAPIPlus to assess noise vs coverage improvement.
